SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.map

Interface MapEntity

All Known Implementing Classes:
CongressionalDistrict, County, Municipality, Nation, State
public interface MapEntity
Any Entity (Nation, State, Municipality, invalid input: '&c') which appears on the Map is a MapEntity. This is a blank interface to allow for polymorphism.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Get a descriptive identifying name for the MapEntity.

    • getPopulation

      int getPopulation()
      Get the total population.

    • setPopulation

      void setPopulation(int population)
      Set the total population.

      Minimum population is zero. If the population is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Parameters:
      population - New population.

    • addPopulation

      void addPopulation(int population)
      Add to the total population.

      Minimum population is zero. If the population is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Parameters:
      population - Amount of population to be added.

    • getLandArea

      double getLandArea()
      Get the total land area.

    • setLandArea

      void setLandArea(double area)
      Set the total land area.

      Minimum land area is zero. If the land area is found to be lower, it will be set to zero.

      Parameters:
      area - New land area

    • getDescriptors

      Set<String> getDescriptors()

    • setDescriptors

      void setDescriptors(DemographicsManager dm, Set<String> descriptors)

    • hasDescriptor

      boolean hasDescriptor(String descriptor)

    • addDescriptor

      boolean addDescriptor(DemographicsManager dm, String descriptor)

    • addAllDescriptors

      boolean addAllDescriptors(DemographicsManager dm, Collection<String> descriptors)

    • removeDescriptor

      boolean removeDescriptor(DemographicsManager dm, String descriptor)

    • removeAllDescriptors

      boolean removeAllDescriptors(DemographicsManager dm, Collection<String> descriptors)

    • getDemographics

      Map<Bloc,Float> getDemographics()

    • getDemographicPercentage

      float getDemographicPercentage(Bloc bloc)
      Get the percentage of a demographic bloc's share within its category.
      Parameters:
      bloc - The bloc to evaluate.
      Returns:
      Float between 0.0 and 1.0 for the bloc's category share.
      See Also:
      • getDemographicPopulation(Bloc)

    • getDemographicPopulation

      int getDemographicPopulation(Bloc bloc)
      Get the population of a demographic bloc's membership.
      Parameters:
      bloc - The bloc to evaluate.
      Returns:
      int between zero and the population.
      See Also:
      • getPopulation()
      • getDemographicPercentage(Bloc)

    • evaluateDemographics

      void evaluateDemographics(DemographicsManager dm)
